zh.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt是Anschetil de Harcourt的兒子，於大約1040年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾。他與Agnes結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1118年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt是Anschetil de Harcourt的儿子，于大约1040年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾。他与Agnes结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1118年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: d'Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt was born about 1040, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Anschetil de Harcourt. He married Agnes. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died before 1118, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt est né environ 1040, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Anschetil de Harcourt. Il a épousé Agnes. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé avant 1118, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt wurde um 1040 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Anschetil de Harcourt geboren. Er hat Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb vor 1118 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt è nato il circa 1040 nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Anschetil de Harcourt. Lui sposato Agnes. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì prima del 1118, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourtは約1040年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでAnschetil de Harcourtの息子として生まれた。Agnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1118年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt(은)는 대략 1040년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 Anschetil de Harcourt의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1118년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Anschetil de Harcourt. Ele casou-se com Agnes. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1118, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt родился около 1040 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Anschetil de Harcourt. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер перед 1118 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Robert d'Harcourt nació aproximadamente 1040, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Anschetil de Harcourt. Se casó con Agnes. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió antes de 1118, en su pueblo.
